diff: The `EXECUTOR_ROLE` on the OpenZeppelin `TimelockController` holding the `OWNER_ROLE` of a Tokenized Treasury Instance is authorized to execute queued operations once the Timelock delay period has elapsed. Across Tokenized Treasury Instances, this role is held by the Grove Proxy at `0x1369f7b2b38c76B6478c0f0E66D94923421891Ba`.
summary: Add Tokenized Treasury Shared Infrastructure And JTRSY Instance
description: Adds shared Tokenized Treasury contract addresses and role definitions at the Grove Liquidity Layer level, onboards the Tokenized Treasury JTRSY instance, and adds the Grove x Steakhouse RLUSD Morpho Vault V2 instance.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
